arts.ttl: Lecce to host Lazio at 20:45 CET
arts.sum: Lazio have won 18 matches against Lecce in Serie A (D7 L9): a 53%-win percentage; among the teams they’ve faced at least 30 times in the competition, the Biancocelesti have a higher percentage of wins only against Cagliari (55%) and Livorno (61%). Lecce have won each of their last three Serie A home games against Lazio, only against Cagliari have they won four home matches in a row in the competition between 2000 and 2008.
On 9 January 2025, Lazio will celebrate its 125th anniversary.

arts.ttl: Napoli’s surprise move for former Juventus star Hasa
arts.sum: Napoli has begun to make significant moves in the transfer market as they prepare for the January window. The club is not only focusing on high-profile signings for manager Antonio Conte but is also looking to invest in promising young talents who could benefit from first-team experience. The post Napoli’s surprise move for former Juventus star Hasa appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Corvino: ‘Lecce won’t part with Dorgu in January despite Napoli Interest’
arts.sum: Pantaleo Corvino, Lecce's technical director, addressed the media today alongside sporting director Trinchera to outline the club's approach to the upcoming January transfer window. Corvino emphasized the unique nature of the winter market, describing it as a "repair market" with its own timelines and easily understood rules. The post Corvino: ‘Lecce won’t part with Dorgu in January despite Napoli Interest’ appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Why Chelsea Youngster Is the Most Feasible Option for Lazio in January
arts.sum: Lazio could turn their attention to Chelsea midfielder Cesare Casadei who might prove to be their most affordable choice in mid-season. Fresh Midfield Woes The Biancocelesti were already in the market for a new midfielder, which has now become a more urgent need with Matias Vecino suffering a relapse that could rule out of action […] The post Why Chelsea Youngster Is the Most Feasible Option for Lazio in January appeared first on The Laziali.

arts.ttl: Giampaolo Prepares Lecce for Tough Lazio Test, Addresses Pelmard Incident
arts.sum: Lecce manager Marco Giampaolo held a press conference ahead of his team’s upcoming Serie A match against Lazio, discussing the challenges they face and addressing recent team issues. Giampaolo acknowledged the strength of their opponents, stating, “The team is strong. I’ve watched several of their games. They play with great confidence and have quality. Even against Inter, they had a great first 30 minutes. We’re facing a strong team. They cover both phases of the game well. There’s little to add. And they’re in high self-esteem despite the setback.” Regarding Lecce’s preparation, Giampaolo emphasized the technical and tactical challenges posed The post Giampaolo Prepares Lecce for Tough Lazio Test, Addresses Pelmard Incident appeared first on FootItalia.com.
